blogs.title: URL Shortener System Design
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to designing a URL shortener service like bit.ly, covering API design, storage, encoding, and implementation of scalable redirect systems
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Netflix Streaming System Design
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to Netflix's streaming architecture, covering content delivery, recommendation systems, device adaptation, and global scaling for 200M+ subscribers
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: YouTube System Design
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to YouTube's system design, covering video storage, transcoding, CDN distribution, recommendations, and streaming architecture at scale
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Design Twitter (X) - System Design
blogs.description: A comprehensive case study on designing a Twitter-scale social media platform covering tweet creation, timeline generation, search, trends, and caching strategies
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: Instagram Feed System Design
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to designing Instagram's feed system, covering content ranking, fan-out mechanisms, caching strategies, and real-time updates for social feeds
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari

blogs.title: WhatsApp Architecture
blogs.description: A comprehensive guide to WhatsApp's system architecture, covering real-time messaging, E2E encryption, media handling, and scaling to billions of users
blogs.author: Abhishek Tiwari
